name: Surprise Packages
recipeIngredient: 36 Thin layered chocolate mint wafers (or other flavor miniature chocolates)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream together the butter and confectioners' sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Gradually add in the flour and mix until combined.
3. Stir in the vanilla extract and water until the dough comes together.
4. Roll out the dough to about 1/8 inch thickness on a floured surface.
5. Cut into 36 pieces using a sharp knife.
6. Wrap each piece around a chocolate mint wafer, pressing gently to seal.
7. Place the wrapped treats in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes to set.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 10-12 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
9. Allow to cool completely before serving.
